headline: AT&T Deepens AI And Open Network Push As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has expanded its asset intelligence solutions through a collaboration with Geoforce. The company reached a milestone and royalty agreement with H2O.ai focused on enterprise-grade AI infrastructure. AT&T became a founding member of the Open Centralized Unit Distributed Unit (OCUDU) Ecosystem Foundation and the GSMA Open Telco AI initiative. The Aduna joint venture extended standardized network APIs to international markets, advancing open telecom standards. For you as an...
